question: Which papers reported both qualitative and quantitative collected data?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 . ?contribution orkgp:P56008 ?dc . ?dc orkgp:DATA ?data . ?data orkgp:P7055 ?dtype . ?dtype orkgp:P57038 ?qual . ?dtype orkgp:P57039 ?quant . OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . } }

question: Which papers published after 2018 reported both recall and precision but no accuracy?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 . ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year . FILTER(xsd:integer(STR(?year)) > 2018) ?contribution orkgp:P15124 ?da . ?da orkgp:P57016 ?ml . ?ml orkgp:P2006 ?metric . ?metric orkgp:P5073 ?recall . ?metric orkgp:P3004 ?precision . FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?contribution orkgp:P15124 ?da2 . ?da2 orkgp:P57016 ?ml2 . ?ml2 orkgp:P2006 ?metric2 . ?metric2 orkgp:P18048 ?accuracy . } OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . } }
